0.FDO/Description.value: An interval for the value (space of real numbers), that has different meanings depending on the primitive data type. If 0.FDO/PrimitiveDataType is string: a range of the length of the value. If 0.FDO/PrimitiveDataType is number or integer: an interval that restricts the attribute value.

_note: See 0.FDO-NumericInterval.md for uncertainty about interval format
